steps.title: Read the vertex form
steps.content:
The equation is in vertex form.
$$y=-16(x-7.2)^2+829$$
So the vertex has $x$-coordinate $7.2$ and $y$-coordinate $829$.

steps.title: Interpret the maximum
steps.content: Because the coefficient of the squared term is negative, the parabola opens downward. The vertex gives the maximum height: $829$ feet at $7.2$ seconds after launch. The answer is C.
